examples.title: CSR Generation
examples.description: OpenSSL command to generate Certificate Signing Request
examples.explanation: Generates private key and CSR with RSA 2048-bit encryption

examples.title: OCSP Request Flow
examples.code:
1. Client sends OCSP request to responder
2. Responder checks CA database
3. Returns 'good', 'revoked', or 'unknown' status
